title: Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation annual report 2023
body: "Report showing value and outcomes of the Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation (RTFO) scheme. This includes:   the value for the reporting period forecast of the value in the subsequent reporting period (2024) outcomes of the scheme   This report has been produced to ensure transparency in the financial reporting of the RTFO.  The RTFO is reported separately to the Department for Transport’s annual report and accounts.  "
